  "findings": [
    "Excessive weld spatter on and adjacent to the weldment",
    "Inadequate post-weld cleanliness violating shop quality standards"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reject the weldment at the current quality gate",
    "Instruct the welder to mechanically remove all spatter using a chipping hammer, wire brush, or grinder",
    "Re-inspect the weld surface for underlying defects once cleaned"
  ],
  "rationale": "The weldment has been rejected at the rough-complete stage due to excessive weld spatter and poor cleanliness. Under AWS D1.1/D1.3 and standard shop WPS quality gates, surfaces must be free of excessive spatter before final acceptance to ensure coating adhesion and to allow for proper visual inspection of the weld profile.",
  "references": [
    "AWS D1.1 Structural Welding Code - Steel",
    "AWS D1.3 Structural Welding Code - Sheet Steel",
    "Shop Welding Procedure Specification (WPS)"
  ]
}
